tool.name: Amazon Bedrock Agents
tool.description: Modular AWS agent platform combining guided Bedrock Agents with framework-agnostic AgentCore deployment.
tool.pricing: Pay-per-use for Bedrock and AgentCore features.
tool.logoNotes: Official AWS architecture icon for Amazon Bedrock (`Arch_Amazon-Bedrock_64.svg` from the AWS Architecture Icons pack), intentionally reused for Bedrock Agents because AWS currently presents Agents as a Bedrock capability rather than with a separate public icon.
tool.practitionerNote: Strong choice for AWS-centric teams that want managed agent primitives and infrastructure alignment without standardising on one open source framework.

dataResidency.detail: Region-selected; cross-region inference stays within the chosen geography (US/EU/JP/AU).

deployment.detail: Fully managed AWS SaaS; AgentCore runtime is AWS-operated.

auditLogging.detail: CloudTrail logs all API activity; CloudWatch metrics; optional S3/CloudWatch storage.

soc2.detail: Amazon Bedrock is in scope for AWS SOC 1/2/3 (Type II via AWS Artifact).

iso42001.detail: Amazon Bedrock is one of four AWS services in accredited ISO/IEC 42001:2023 scope.

euAiAct.detail: Agent orchestration platform; GPAI obligations attach to model providers and the deployer.

licenseRisk.detail: Proprietary AWS SaaS; lock-in to AWS model catalog and AgentCore runtime.
